DisplayName.SourceString: OMEGA KNIGHT'S LEVEL UP QUEST PACK
DisplayName.LocalizedString: OMEGA KNIGHT'S LEVEL UP QUEST PACK

DisclaimerText.SourceString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.

ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FADB00FF">Get the Omega Knight outfit with purchase </><text color="FFFFFFFF">and complete weekly quests to earn up to 28 levels and unlock cosmetic rewards!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete quests by collecting </><text color="FADB00FF">Level Up Tokens</><text color="FFFFFFFF"> throughout the Chapter 3 map before the end of Season 2.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Each week 7 new quests become available and can be completed until the end of the season (June 3 2022 ET).</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FADB00FF">Get the Omega Knight outfit with purchase </><text color="FFFFFFFF">and complete weekly quests to earn up to 28 levels and unlock cosmetic rewards!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete quests by collecting </><text color="FADB00FF">Level Up Tokens</><text color="FFFFFFFF"> throughout the Chapter 3 map before the end of Season 2.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Each week 7 new quests become available and can be completed until the end of the season (June 3 2022 ET).</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Every quest: 1 full XP level per token</>
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Every quest: 1 full XP level per token</>
